description: A young female adventurer at the very start of her journey, before she has found any gear, weapons or armor — this is the bare starting character, exactly how she looks before any equipment is picked up. Extremely tough, self-assured, and powerfully confident with a strong rebellious edge, a fierce and determined expression, sharp intense eyes that stare straight ahead with quiet defiance, windswept dark brown hair, and a lean, athletic, toned build that shows strength and agility. Her posture is relaxed but commanding — weight shifted to one leg, shoulders back, chin slightly raised, exuding natural charisma and badass energy. She wears ONLY plain, simple, unremarkable starting clothes in muted natural colors — a plain worn shirt or tunic and simple trousers with basic boots — strictly in browns, blacks, greys and off-white, nothing colorful. The clothes fit her athletic frame naturally, hinting at her physicality without being revealing. She has NO gear of any kind: no armor, no jacket, no shoulder guard, no cloak, no utility belt, no gloves, no weapon, no sword, no dagger, no bags or pouches — completely unequipped. Not cute, not a princess, not wearing a dress. She radiates cool, memorable, capable badass energy purely through her sharp facial features, intense gaze, windswept hair, powerful posture, and self-confident body language. High-quality RPG pixel-art character, clean readable silhouette, strong shape language, expressive face, restrained muted earth-tone palette, full-body character, single centered figure, transparent background.
